nasb.text: And when they had summoned them, they commanded them not to speak or teach at all in the name of Jesus.

esv.text: So they called them and charged them not to speak or teach at all in the name of Jesus.

cnv.text: 於是叫了他們來，嚴禁他們再奉耶穌的名講論教導。

ccb.text: 于是，他们又把使徒传来，严令他们不许再奉耶稣的名讲论或传道。

csbs.text: 于是把他们叫来，吩咐他们绝对不可奉耶稣的名讲说或教导人。
